name: World Finance
description_short: Oklahoma City, OK's World Finance at 3000 SW 89th St provides fast personal loans with flexible terms.
description_long:
World Finance at 3000 SW 89th St, Suite D in Oklahoma City, OK is a standalone personal loan office serving Southwest Oklahoma City. The branch is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 5:30 PM, providing convenient access for professionals who need quick funding.

The Oklahoma City location offers personal loans ranging from $100 to $15,000 with fast underwriting and flexible terms. Call +1 405-688-9700 to discuss your loan options, or visit in person. Most decisions are made within hours, with same-day funding available.

To apply at this Oklahoma City branch, bring a valid government ID, proof of income, and a recent bank statement. World Finance specializes in quick personal lending for borrowers who need cash fast and can't wait for traditional bank approval.
address: 3000 SW 89th St Suite D, Oklahoma City, OK 73159

company_info.headquarters: 3000 SW 89th St Suite D, Oklahoma City, OK 73159

pros: One-on-one personalized loan consultations with trained staff
Multiple financial products under one roof (loans, tax prep, refund advances, roadside assistance)
Established local presence with dedicated branch manager and community ties
Positive customer reviews highlighting staff professionalism and responsiveness
Educational content available (blog articles on loan management, credit building, secured vs. unsecured loans)
Flexible lending approach for customers with varying credit histories, including first-time borrowers
cons: Limited to single Memphis branch location with no online-only application option mentioned
APR rates and loan terms not disclosed on website
No information provided about credit score requirements or minimum loan amounts
Saturday hours require calling ahead, limiting weekend accessibility
No mention of prepayment penalties or flexible repayment options
best_for: Memphis residents seeking personal loans with in-person guidance
First-time borrowers building credit who benefit from personalized explanation
Customers needing bundled services (loans plus tax preparation)
Spanish-speaking borrowers requiring bilingual financial services
diagnosis: World Finance is best for Memphis-area consumers who prefer in-person relationships and personalized guidance when borrowing, particularly those building credit or managing multiple financial needs simultaneously. The main caveat is lack of transparency around pricing, rates, and terms on their website, requiring customers to contact the branch directly for specific loan details.
meta_description: World Finance at 3000 SW 89th St, Oklahoma City, OK. Fast personal loans with same-day funding.
